title: The Enchanting Blue Caves by the Sea

scenes.text: These caves glow with an ethereal blue light.
This is the Blue Caves, located on Zakynthos Island, Greece.
The blue color results from sunlight reflecting off the white cave walls.
Visitors can swim inside these luminous waters.
scenes.label: SWIM IN GLORY

scenes.text: Follow for a new corner of Earth every day.

description: 📍 Blue Caves, Zakynthos Island - Greece. These stunning caves radiate a magical blue light, drawing visitors to their glowing waters. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
